overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character with a large yellow cargo backpack traversing a desolate, rainy wasteland. The character walks from grassy terrain onto rocky plateaus and descends steep slopes in a foggy, mountainous environment with cinematic lighting and atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy wasteland with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassy wasteland carrying large yellow cargo load on back

entered.detail: large rock formation with distinctive red vegetation on top visible at start
hazy mountain peaks visible in the background through rain
leafless twisted tree standing in the wasteland
uneven grassy terrain with patches of dirt and small rocks

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a desolate grassy wasteland in heavy rain. A distinctive rocky outcrop with red vegetation sits to the right while distant mountains loom through the haze. The terrain is uneven with scattered dead trees and the camera follows steadily from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between grass and rocky plateau

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy wasteland to rocky dirt terrain with scattered stones

agents.ego_description: traversing the rocky plateau, maintaining balance while carrying the heavy cargo load

entered.detail: exposed rocky ground with minimal grass coverage and scattered stones
cluster of medium-sized rocks emerging from the ground

segments.scene_description: The character moves from grassy terrain onto a rocky plateau. The distinctive starting rock formation disappears behind as the ground becomes increasingly stony and barren. Rain continues to fall steadily as the character navigates the uneven rocky surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky expanse with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking across the open rocky plateau toward the distant mountainous terrain

entered.detail: sunken dry creek bed visible in the distance to the right

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a vast open rocky expanse with minimal vegetation. The distant mountains shift from left to center as the character progresses. A dry riverbed becomes visible in the far distance while the rain creates a misty atmosphere over the barren landscape.

events.description: character begins descending steep rocky slope, adjusting posture and gait for downhill movement

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating down the steep rocky slope, maintaining balance with the heavy cargo load

entered.detail: sharp downward incline of loose rocks and crumbling earth
vertical rock wall rising to the left of the descent path

segments.scene_description: The character begins a careful descent down a steep rocky slope. The terrain changes from flat plateau to a sharp incline with loose rocks. A cliff face rises on the left while a distant valley becomes visible ahead through the rain. The character adjusts their movement to navigate the dangerous downward path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy wasteland that transforms from a desolate grassy plain into a steep, rocky descent. It begins with the character walking through uneven grass and dead trees, passing a rocky outcrop with red vegetation as distant mountains loom through the haze. As the character progresses, the grassy terrain gives way to a barren rocky plateau, causing the initial landmarks to disappear behind the camera. The scene then expands across a vast, stony expanse where a dry riverbed emerges in the distance and the mountains shift toward the center of the frame. Finally, the flat plateau transitions into a sharp incline, leading the character down a steep rocky slope beside a rising cliff face toward a distant valley.
